notes: NI Abbey Road Modern Drummer — multi-mic drum kit recorded at Abbey Road Studios. Runs in Kontakt. Individual mic channels can be mixed via Quick Controls. The close/overhead/room balance is the key real-time control for changing the drum sound character.

Quick Control 1.description: Kick Close Mic Level — tight, punchy kick character

Quick Control 2.description: Snare Top Mic Level — crack and attack

Quick Control 3.description: Overhead Mic Level — cymbals and kit overview

Quick Control 4.description: Room Mic Level — abbey road room ambience (more = bigger/roomy sound)

Quick Control 5.description: Kick Sub Level — low-frequency body of the kick

Quick Control 6.description: Snare Bottom Mic — snare wire buzz/rattle character

Quick Control 7.description: Hi-Hat Level — overall hi-hat volume in mix

Quick Control 8.description: Reverb/Room Blend — overall room/close mic ratio

Overhead Level.description: Overhead mics — captures full kit with cymbals

Room Level.description: Room microphone level — the Abbey Road sound
